creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to ghislain from comment #2)

–     parentheses (plural)
– not parenthesis


> Each set of brackets represents either a group of one or more users or 
> the name of another netgroup. 

– could become: 

> For each member of the group: parentheses surround the hostname, 
> username and domainname.
